# SPo2 Test Golden Vectors

These vectors characterize `PbSpo2TestResult` to public SPo2 test model mapping after KMP migration. The vectors intentionally keep Android and iOS expectations separate where public models differ today: Android exposes `testTime` as a formatted string, while iOS exposes a `Date`; both generated protos currently omit `triggerType`, so public triggerType remains null. `Spo2CommonPolicyTest.kt` executes shared optional-presence preservation, empty recording-device normalization, nullable trigger-type policy for the current generated proto shape, unknown enum mapping policy, and `spo2-readiness.json` behavior-family coverage for full passed/normal field mapping, optional protobuf presence preservation, empty recording-device normalization, no-generated-trigger-field platform reference, unknown SPo2-class boundary behavior, platform SPo2 vector references, and the `compile-verification-gate`.
